backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: password-protected entry, math puzzle, interactive gift reveal, birthday celebration, and final message pages with their associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the five-page flow, component functionality, styling, and utility functions.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS configuration with CSS custom properties for design tokens including colors, radius, and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title 'For Kashaf 💜' that loads the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component managing sequential page navigation through five states: password, puzzle, gift, birthday, and final message.
frontend/src/components/BirthdayPage.tsx: Birthday celebration page displaying personalized messages from Shamaaim with a button to advance to the final message.
frontend/src/components/FinalMessagePage: Final message page displaying heartfelt friendship messages with no further navigation.
frontend/src/components/GiftPage.tsx: Interactive gift page with bouncing emoji that reveals a humorous message on click and auto-advances after 4 seconds.
frontend/src/components/PasswordPage.tsx: Password entry page validating secret code '23023006' with error handling for incorrect attempts.
frontend/src/components/PuzzlePage.tsx: Math puzzle page validating answer '16' with success/error messages and auto-advance after correct answer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing ICP actor creation with Internet Identity authentication and query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication with login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Comic Sans font, purple gradient background, custom fade-in and bounce animations, and semi-transparent puzzle box styling.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional Tailwind CSS class merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point setting up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and rendering the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom purple theme colors, Comic Sans MS font, OKLCH color system, container queries, typography, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a password-protected birthday web app with 6 features including puzzle pages, gift reveals, and celebration messages in a purple gradient theme.
